item.title: Pilot Public Bank $450 checking bonus
item.description: Pilot Public Bank offers a $450 checking bonus for new customers. Open a qualifying checking account by December 31, 2026. Receive qualifying direct deposits totaling $2,000 within 90 days. Monthly service fee is $10, waived with qualifying direct deposit. Available only to residents of CA, OR, WA. Final terms must be verified on the official institution page.
